scripts.install:anvil: bash -lc 'if ! command -v anvil >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup; fi'
scripts.generate:ui: bun run generate:shared-js && bun run ui:shared && bun run generate:ui-vendor
scripts.setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd .. && bun run setup-contracts && bun run shared:build && bun run ui:vendor && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.compile-contracts: cd solidity && bun x tsc --project tsconfig-compile.json && bun run ./js/compile.js && cd .. && bun run generate:ui-contract-artifact
scripts.generate: bun run generate:contracts && bun run generate:ui
scripts.tsc: bun run tsc:app && bun run tsc:scripts && bun run tsc:solidity
scripts.ui:setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../solidity && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run setup && cd .. && bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.app:build: bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.test: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run tsc && bun test --parallel=4 --timeout 300000
scripts.check: bunx @biomejs/biome check package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts ui/css
scripts.check:changed: bunx @biomejs/biome check --changed --since origin/main package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts ui/css
scripts.lint: bun x @biomejs/biome check package.json tsconfig.scripts.json scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts
scripts.lint:fix: bun x @biomejs/biome check --write package.json tsconfig.scripts.json scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json README.md AGENTS.md docs scripts shared/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/tsconfig.json ui/build ui/dev-server.ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css
scripts.ui:docker: docker build -f ui/Dockerfile . -t zoltar-ui && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway zoltar-ui
